case_title: KEN LIM VS. EARNEST PARKER et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM, KEN SERVED JUL-30-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KIMOTO, KEITH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIM, KEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKER, EARNEST KIMOTO, KEITH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 14 FREDSON COURT, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, EARNEST KIMOTO, KEITH

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE DAILY RENTAL VALUE OF $70.00 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM, KEN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, EARNEST KIMOTO, KEITH
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, EARNEST KIMOTO, KEITH
